segments.text: Doesn't get a punch off of holy water though.
He seems to get away from ledge, I just wonder...
That's what you guys tell me, that Upi never kills.
If you DI that well, he just never kills.

full_text: Doesn't get a punch off of holy water though. He seems to get away from ledge, I just wonder... Can he get a punch? Grab, there, there. Mmm. That's what you guys tell me, that Upi never kills. If you DI that well, he just never kills.
